'''''Jedi Tricks for Dummies''''' was a book in the [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Jedi Archives]]. [[Bink Otauna/Legends|Bink Otauna]] used it while trying to use a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] to convince [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] to ignore him playing tricks on [[Jocasta Nu/Legends|Jocasta Nu]].

==Behind the scenes==
This is a parody of the [[Wikipedia:...for Dummies|''...for Dummies'']] book series.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tag & Bink: Revenge of the Clone Menace]]''
